---
title: "Workshops"
description: "Hands-on workshops on Automated Text Recognition offered as part of this teaching resource."
---

This section collects materials and schedules for workshops on Automated Text Recognition. Each workshop page includes a detailed agenda, links to the relevant sections of this resource, and any supplementary handouts or slides.

## Upcoming and Recent Workshops

::: {.section-cards}
<a href="dmsi-2026-kalamazoo/index.qmd" class="section-card">
<div class="section-card-icon">🏛️</div>
<h3>DMSI 2026 Kalamazoo</h3>
<p>Introduction to Handwritten Text Recognition — Medieval Congress, Sangren Hall 1720, 13 May 2026.</p>
</a>
:::
